description: Extend the Chinook database at /home/ga/Documents/databases/chinook_extended.db (Connection name: 'ChinookExtended') to support multi-currency invoicing. Create a reference table named 'currencies' with columns CurrencyCode (TEXT PRIMARY KEY), CurrencyName (TEXT), and ExchangeRateToUSD (REAL), populated with USD (1.00), EUR (1.08), GBP (1.27), CAD (0.74), BRL (0.20), and AUD (0.65). Add a CurrencyCode column to the 'invoices' table with a default value of 'USD' and update it based on BillingCountry: 'EUR' for France, Germany, Austria, Belgium, Finland, Ireland, Italy, Netherlands, Portugal, and Spain; 'GBP' for United Kingdom; 'CAD' for Canada; 'BRL' for Brazil; 'AUD' for Australia; and 'USD' for all others. Create a view named 'currency_revenue_summary' showing CurrencyCode, CurrencyName, InvoiceCount, TotalLocalRevenue (sum of Total), and TotalRevenueUSD (sum of Total * ExchangeRate), ordered by TotalRevenueUSD descending. Export the view results to /home/ga/Documents/exports/currency_revenue.csv and save the SQL migration script to /home/ga/Documents/scripts/multicurrency_migration.sql.
